Biomedical > B__y___g___4a_asiccare for our Desins for Vision loues 0 When not in use, we recommend placing your Ioupes back into their transport case to prevent damage over time. Placing loupes on a hard surface will weaken the glue holding the telescopes over time. o We recommend replacing the nose pads (on frames where this is possible) whenever the pads become hard with age. This service is provided by us at no charge. 0 Replacement head straps and microfiber lens cloths are available as required at no charge for the life of your loupes. 0 Do not attempt to adjust the nose pads by pulling or pushing on the soft part of the pads. This will cause them to become loose and may lead to the nose pad coming away from the frame. 0 Do not use lens cleaners with a high alcohol or ammonia content as these will damage the lens coatings. Optometrists can supply suitable lens cleaning solutions. 0 Do not immerse your Ioupes in liquid to clean them, this will allow liquid to enter the telescopes and void their warranty.
